parameters.query:
SELECT id, name, email, user_profile, program_plan,
  CASE
    WHEN week1_sent_at IS NOT NULL AND week2_sent_at IS NULL AND week1_sent_at + interval '7 days' <= NOW() THEN 2
    WHEN week2_sent_at IS NOT NULL AND week3_sent_at IS NULL AND week2_sent_at + interval '7 days' <= NOW() THEN 3
    WHEN week3_sent_at IS NOT NULL AND week4_sent_at IS NULL AND week3_sent_at + interval '7 days' <= NOW() THEN 4
  END AS week_to_send
FROM leads
WHERE payment_date IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    (week1_sent_at IS NOT NULL AND week2_sent_at IS NULL AND week1_sent_at + interval '7 days' <= NOW()) OR
    (week2_sent_at IS NOT NULL AND week3_sent_at IS NULL AND week2_sent_at + interval '7 days' <= NOW()) OR
    (week3_sent_at IS NOT NULL AND week4_sent_at IS NULL AND week3_sent_at + interval '7 days' <= NOW())
  )
